expectedValue: RUN gem install bundler is 'gem install <gem>:<version>'
actualValue: RUN gem install bundler is 'gem install <gem>', you should use 'gem install <gem>:<version>
RUN ["gem", "install", "blunder"] is 'gem install <gem>', you should use 'gem install <gem>:<version>

expectedValue: RUN gem install grpc -v ${GRPC_RUBY_VERSION} blunder is 'gem install <gem>:<version>'
actualValue: RUN gem install grpc -v ${GRPC_RUBY_VERSION} blunder is 'gem install <gem>', you should use 'gem install <gem>:<version>
